notes: Structural drying in health-care facilities. Keep calm and non-clinical-alarming: empty back-of-house/service areas only, absolutely no patients or distressing scenes. Show real equipment: air movers, dehumidifiers, HEPA negative air machines, containment barriers, moisture meters. Australian, metric. No on-image text, no logos.

images.context: Course hero — drying and containment set up in an empty health-care service corridor
images.prompt: A water-damage restoration technician in hi-vis and nitrile gloves deploying air movers and a refrigerant dehumidifier in a calm, empty back-of-house corridor of an Australian health-care facility, a clear polyethylene containment barrier separating the work zone, bright and spotlessly clean, no patients present. Professional, reassuring, soft natural light. Realistic photography, mid-distance framing.
images.negativePrompt: no on-image text, no logos, no brand names, no watermarks, no gore, no distressing imagery, no patients, no identifiable face-forward portraits, no beds or medical procedures, no clinical alarm, no US power outlets, no imperial-only units

images.context: Module 1 — HEPA negative air machine and containment anteroom
images.prompt: A HEPA negative air machine with flexible ducting running beside a zippered polyethylene containment barrier and anteroom in a quiet, empty Australian hospital service area, maintaining negative pressure during drying, no patients present. Clean, controlled, professional, even lighting. Realistic photography, mid-distance framing.

images.context: Module 1 & 2 — moisture-meter and environmental monitoring in a back-of-house area
images.prompt: Over-the-shoulder view of a technician's gloved hands using a handheld moisture meter against a wall and checking a small digital environmental monitor in an empty, clean back-of-house area of an Australian health-care facility, an air mover running softly in the background, no patients. Calm, hands-on-task framing, precise. Realistic photography.
